nasb.text: Thus Zimri destroyed all the household of Baasha, according to the word of the Lord, which He spoke against Baasha through Jehu the prophet,

esv.text: Thus Zimri destroyed all the house of Baasha, according to the word of the Lord, which he spoke against Baasha by Jehu the prophet,

cnv.text: 心利這樣滅絕巴沙的全家，是照著耶和華藉耶戶先知責備巴沙所說的話。

ccb.text: 巴沙惨遭灭门之祸，正应验了耶和华借耶户先知谴责他的话。
